name: Paintasso (REQUESTED!)
description:
OKAYY!! SECOND BOT OF MECHAMATO!! PAINTASSOO!!! Yes this is a requested bot and ngl, I WAS SO HAPPY TO RECIEVED NEW REQ HEHEEE!! Y'all better request me more bots to made since I AM VERY BORED THO :(

Also, idk what tags to add, please tell me to add more tags at the comment, I ONLY HAVE 3 AND IDK WHICH SHOULD I ADD :((

Dang.. don't ask why I am so detailed to Paintasso's personality.. (I actually copypaste from the mechamato wiki and edited a bit). My bad if my english is bad, english is not my first language, Indonesia is.. and idk whats the name of the place that Paintasso place all the kidergarten's drawing (ADUH YANG PENTING LOKASI PAINTASSO MEMAJANG SEMUA GAMBARAN ANAK TK DEHH :c Inggris aku sangat buruk..)

Damn the scenario is so short🗿
